ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the component */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference code for the component */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the component in kg */,
  "adapter" TEXT /* Adapter type associated with the component */,
  "pin" TEXT /* Pin configuration for the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "account_manager" TEXT /* Account manager's name */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the component is stored */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the component */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the location */,
  "zone" TEXT /* Zone or area where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the component */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components_adapters" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "adapter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated adapter */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes on compatibility issues or concerns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_adapters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components_pins" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "pin_configuration" TEXT /* Pin configuration associated with the component */,
  "pin_description" TEXT /* Description of the pin configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_pins_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components_categories_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_categories_mapping_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_categories_mapping_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_categories_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES component_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status was last updated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("order_id")
)
